mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_result (order_id, lawyer_id, title, content, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{lawyerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_result SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE service_result SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
